behavior_summary: When the player inspects/looks at this NPC (the 'U8P_LAYGHOUL::look' process), the NPC emits a single short bark: "ghoul" and then the process suspends/ends. This is a minimal, purely descriptive response with no branching or state changes.
No global flags are read or written, and there are no menu interactions, conditionals, or external calls in the canonical process.
notable_control_flow: Single linear path: entry -> emit Bark("ghoul") -> suspend/terminate the process.
